meaning: n.甘草(指植物甘草的干根,可供药用等)
examples: The objective is to establish a quantitative method for determining the content of saponin G2 and ammonium glycyrrhizinate in Glycyrrhiza uralensis.
Objective To study the effects of Glycyrrhiza polysaccharide on immune function in mice.
Objective: to study the effect of glycyrrhiza polysaccharide to the immunity function of mice.
